{{Quote|Yer little friend is kind of agitated.|A Ychthytonian, on R2-D2|<ref name="TNR">''[[The New Rebellion]]''</ref>}}
The '''Ychthytonians''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] of four-[[Limb/Legends|armed]] beings native to the [[Ychthyton system/Legends|Ychthyton system]]. They were part of the [[galactic community]] by [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] and were part of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] by [[14 ABY/Legends|14 ABY]]. One notable Ychthytonian was the [[Bartender/Legends|bartender]] [[Bômlas]], who worked in the [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid belt]] [[Smuggler's Run/Legends|Smuggler's Run]], a hideout for hundreds of [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]].

==Biology and appearance==
The Ychthytonians were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of four-[[Limb/Legends|armed]] [[Sentience/Legends|sentients]]. They had [[Ear/Legends|ears]] and vocal structures that enabled them to speak [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Galactic Basic Standard]].<ref name="TNR" />

==History==
{{Quote|Got a special order for, get this, Ychthytonian tunics! I'd never heard of them. But I found someone who has a pattern, and I need you to get it.|A buyer of Ychthytonian tunics, to a spacer|<ref name="AED">{{GalaxiesAED}}</ref>}}
The Ychthytonians were native to the [[Ychthyton system/Legends|Ychthyton system]], located in the [[Belderone sector/Legends|Belderone sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="TEAOC" /> They were participants in the [[galactic community]] by [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] and were part of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] in [[14 ABY/Legends|14 ABY]].<ref name="TNR" /> Following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], a buyer put in a special order for Ychthytonian tunics.<ref name="AED" />
{{Gamemechanics|Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided}}
The individual had never heard of them before, but they found someone who had a pattern, and contracted the services of a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] to receive the delivery in exchange for [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]]. Because of the Ychthytonian's four arms, the tunics made excellent tablecloths. After receiving the Ychthytonian tunic pattern, the buyer remarked that the tunic could even cover a table's legs, which the purchaser deemed as "overkill."<ref name="AED" />
{{Endgame}}
When [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] resigned from her position as [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] of the Republic due to allegations that her husband, the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]]-turned-[[General/Legends|general]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], had been somehow involved in the [[Bombing of the Senate Hall|Senate bombing]] that occurred that [[Standard year/Legends|year]], her role was filled by [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]]. A [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Unidentified Ychthytonian well-wisher|Ychthytonian]] was among the well-wishers, [[Senator/Legends|senator's]] aides, and employment seekers that gathered in Mothma's anteroom to offer their congratulations. Also in the room at the time were the [[Droid/Legends|droids]] [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]], who believed they had uncovered the source of the bombing. The latter concealed himself behind the Ychthytonian from a [[Kloperian]] [[Unidentified Kloperian guard|guard]] he had encountered earlier. When C-3PO almost announced their findings to all present in the waiting room, R2-D2 screeched to get him to stop, causing the Ychthytonian to use all four hands to cover his [[Ear/Legends|ears]] in discomfort. When R2-D2 then fled the anteroom, the Ychthytonian pointed the [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] in the direction of his missing counterpart.<ref name="TNR" />

==Ychthytonians in the galaxy==
Some Ychthytonians found work in the galaxy as [[Bartender/Legends|bartenders]], taking advantage of their four arms to deliver drinks quickly.<ref name="TNR" /> In 0 ABY, a [[Unidentified Ychthytonian bartender|Ychthytonian]] worked as a bartender in [[Kislov's Gambling Palace]], located on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tythe/Legends|Tythe]]. A gloomy individual, he utilized all four hands to serve his patrons their [[Alcohol/Legends|alcohol]] and [[Caf/Legends|caf]].<ref name="RFR">''[[Rebel Force: Renegade]]''</ref> Another Ychthytonian bartender was [[Bômlas]]. He was infamous for having bet and lost one of his arms<ref name="TNR" /> in a particularly savage game of [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]];<ref name="SWE">''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref> however he was still the fastest bartender known to Han Solo. In 14 ABY he worked at a bar on [[Skip 1|Skip One]], an [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] located in [[Smuggler's Run/Legends|Smuggler's Run]] and frequented by smugglers and other fringers.<ref name="TNR" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Ychthytonians were created by [[Kristine Kathryn Rusch]] for her novel ''[[The New Rebellion]]'', published in [[1995]].<ref name="TNR" />
